candidate_definitions.text: 📦 A bucket for Scoop, for Oracle Java, OpenJDK, Eclipse Temurin, IBM Semeru, Zulu, ojdkbuild, Amazon Corretto, BellSoft Liberica, SapMachine and Microsoft JDK.

A bucket for [Scoop](https://scoop.sh), for [Oracle Java](https://www.oracle.com/java/), [OpenJDK](https://openjdk.java.net), [Eclipse Temurin](https://adoptium.net), [IBM Semeru](https://developer.ibm.com/languages/java/semeru-runtimes), [Zulu](https://www.azul.com/products/zul…
